title: Logical Widgets
text: Logical Widgets The list of logical widgets in Uniface. Logical widgets: AttributesOnly Checkbox CommandButton DatePicker DropDownList DspContainer EditBox FlatButton FlatButton_updatable ListBox NumberSpinnerBox Password Picture PictureButton RadioGroup RawHTML RawHTML_updatable StaticText StaticText_updatable TextArea ux-Button ux-Checkbox ux-DataGrid ux-DatePicker ux-DateTimePicker ux-EmailField ux-HeaderFooter ux-Layout ux-ListBox ux-NumberField ux-PasswordField ux-PlainText ux-RadioGroup ux-Select ux-Switch ux-TelField ux-TextArea ux-TextField ux-TimePicker ux-UrlField Was this topic helpful?
